channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KOTHARIPRO] Kothari Products: Non-Promoter Shareholding 4.13M Shares (11,652 Holders)
item.description:
Kothari Products Ltd has disclosed its non-promoter shareholding details as of March 31, 2026. The company reported that there are 11,652 non-promoter shareholders who hold shares valued up to ₹2 lakh. These shareholders collectively own a total of 4,135,166 shares. This information was furnished in reference to a SEBI letter dated February 23, 2006, regarding shareholding disclosures.

  • Non-promoter shareholding reported as of March 31, 2026.
  • 11,652 non-promoter shareholders hold shares up to ₹2 lakh.
  • These shareholders collectively own 4,135,166 shares.
  • Disclosure made in compliance with SEBI guidelines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOTHARI PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [TECHKGREEN] Techknowgreen to launch 'SusT' blockchain tokens for sustainability
item.description:
Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd. announced its decision to launch "SusT" (Sustainable Token), a blockchain-based token, as part of its sustainability-linked initiatives. The tokens, set to be issued from April 2, 2026, will serve as a verification-driven reward system for environmental action. Issuance criteria include 0.1% of client payment for service-based tokens and 1 Cu SusT token for every 10,000 m³ of air purified by its Yuka Yantra air purifiers. This initiative aims to translate verified environmental efforts into durable value and scale sustainability across various sectors.

  • Company to issue "SusT" blockchain tokens for sustainability initiatives.
  • Tokens will be issued from April 2, 2026, based on specific criteria.
  • Issuance linked to client payments and air purification output.
  • Aims to create a verification-driven reward system for environmental action.
  • Positions TSL to scale sustainability across sectors and behaviors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KERNEX] Kernex Microsystems Bags ₹67.53 Cr KAVACH Loco Equipment Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kernex Microsystems India Ltd has secured a significant domestic order valued at ₹67.53 Crores (including GST) from PCMM Office, Patiala (PLW). The contract involves the supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of On-board KAVACH Loco Equipment, adhering to RDSO Specification No. RDSO/SPN/196/2020, Version 4.0 or latest. This order is a crucial development for the company, reinforcing its position in the railway signaling and safety systems sector. The execution of this project is slated to be completed on or before April 15, 2027. The company confirmed no promoter or promoter group interest in the awarding entity, and the transaction does not fall under related party transactions.

  • Kernex Microsystems secured a domestic order worth ₹67.53 Crores.
  • The order is from PCMM Office, Patiala for KAVACH Loco Equipment.
  • It covers supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of equipment.
  • The project is scheduled for completion by April 15, 2027.
  • This deal strengthens the company's railway safety systems portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERNEX MICROSYSTEMS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Jupiter Infomedia Board to consider Q4/FY26 results, fundraise, new directors
item.description:
Jupiter Infomedia Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Monday, April 20, 2026. The key agenda items include the consideration and approval of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will discuss raising funds through a Preferential Issue of shares/warrants, altering the Main Object, Capital, and Registered Office Clauses of the Memorandum of Association, and appointing new directors. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for the company's securities is closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the board meeting outcome is announced.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 20, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • To consider raising funds via preferential issue of shares/warrants.
  • Agenda includes altering MoA clauses and appointing new directors.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until meeting outcome.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JAYKAY] Jaykay Enterprises to acquire Patange Industries' defence business
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jaykay Enterprises Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the acquisition of the Business Undertaking of Patange Industries Private Limited (PIPL) via a slump sale on a going concern basis. PIPL's undertaking is engaged in defence precision manufacturing, fabrication, and engineering design services. This strategic acquisition aims to expand Jaykay Enterprises' presence in the Defence & Aerospace sector and strengthen its engineering and technological capabilities. The transaction will be for a lump sum cash consideration. The acquired business undertaking reported a turnover of ₹903.06 Lakhs in FY 2024-25.

  • Jaykay Enterprises to acquire Patange Industries' defence business.
  • Acquisition is via slump sale for a lump sum cash consideration.
  • Strategic move to expand into the Defence & Aerospace sector.
  • PIPL's defence business reported FY25 turnover of ₹903.06 Lakhs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAYKAY ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DEVX] DevX secures ₹110 Cr enterprise deal for managed workspaces
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dev Accelerator Limited (DevX) has signed a landmark 9-year, ₹110 crore agreement with Manubhai and Shah LLP for approximately 1,00,000 sq. ft. of managed workspace in Ahmedabad. This deal, one of the largest enterprise-led flexible workspace transactions in a Tier-II city, involves Manubhai and Shah LLP relocating its headquarters to DevX’s Capital One campus, committing over 1,000 seats in Phase 1. The agreement provides strong long-term revenue visibility for DevX and underscores the increasing institutional adoption of managed office solutions by large enterprises, particularly as businesses expand beyond traditional metros. The Capital One campus also hosts a diverse mix of other enterprise occupiers, highlighting the growing demand for integrated, experience-led workspaces in emerging business hubs.

  • DevX secured a ₹110 crore, 9-year enterprise deal with Manubhai and Shah LLP.
  • The agreement covers 1,00,000 sq. ft. of managed workspace in Ahmedabad.
  • This landmark deal provides strong long-term revenue visibility for DevX.
  • It signifies growing institutional adoption of managed office solutions beyond metros.
  • The campus attracts diverse enterprise occupiers, highlighting market demand.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Accelerator Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [STLTECH] STL announces demise of Saumya Mondal, Interim CHRO
item.description:
Sterlite Technologies Ltd (STL) has announced the sad demise of Mr. Saumya Mondal, who served as the Interim Chief Human Resource Officer (CHRO) and was considered a Senior Management Personnel of the company. The company was informed of his passing on April 12, 2026. The management and employees have conveyed their deep sorrow and condolences to his family. This event marks a change in the senior management team.

  • Sterlite Technologies announced the demise of Interim CHRO Saumya Mondal.
  • Mr. Mondal was a Senior Management Personnel of the company.
  • His cessation date from the role is April 12, 2026.
  • The company will need to fill this senior leadership position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STERLITE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PANORAMA] Panorama Studios signs distribution deal for 'Daadi Ki Shaadi'
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Panorama Studios International Ltd has executed a Theatrical Distribution Agreement with M/S. DKS FILM LLP. This agreement grants Panorama Studios the theatrical exploitation rights for the Hindi film 'Daadi Ki Shaadi' across pan India and international territories, specifically excluding France and Turkey. The film features a notable cast including Kapil Sharma, Sadia Khateeb, R Sarathkumar, Neetu Kapoor, and Ridhima Kapoor, and is directed by Ashish R Mohan. This deal expands the company's distribution portfolio and potential revenue streams from film exploitation.

  • Panorama Studios secured theatrical distribution rights.
  • Agreement with DKS FILM LLP for 'Daadi Ki Shaadi'.
  • Rights cover pan India and most international markets.
  • Film features Kapil Sharma and other notable actors.
  • Enhances company's distribution portfolio and revenue streams.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Panorama Studios International Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [CENTERAC] Centerac Technologies not a 'Large Corporate' as per SEBI norms
item.description:
Centerac Technologies Ltd has confirmed that it does not fall under the category of a 'Large Corporate' (LC) as of March 31, 2026. This declaration is made in accordance with the framework and applicability criteria outlined in SEBI Circulars SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018, and SEBI Operational Circulars SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021. These circulars pertain to fund-raising by the issuance of debt securities by large entities. By confirming its non-applicability, Centerac Technologies Ltd indicates it is not subject to the specific compliance requirements mandated for Large Corporates regarding debt financing.

  • Company confirms non-applicability as a 'Large Corporate'.
  • Exempt from specific SEBI debt issuance compliance for LCs.
  • Status is as of March 31, 2026, per SEBI circulars.
  • Indicates company size or financial metrics are below LC thresholds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Centerac Technologies Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [STOVACQ] Stovec Industries Files FY2025 Business Responsibility & Sustainability Report
item.description:
Stovec Industries Ltd has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The report provides comprehensive general disclosures, including the company's incorporation in 1973 and its core business of manufacturing rotary and digital printing machines, engravers, and consumables for the textile and graphic industries, which accounts for 100% of its turnover. Textile consumables and graphics products contribute 83.30% of turnover, while textile machineries contribute 16.70%. The company's operations are national, with 2 plants and 1 office, and exports represent 27.44% of its total turnover. Employee data for FY2025 shows 104 permanent employees (97.12% male, 2.88% female) and 175 workers (100% male), with women comprising 20% of the Board of Directors.

  • Stovec Industries submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for FY2025.
  • The report covers the financial year from January 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025.
  • Company manufactures printing machines and consumables for textile and graphic industries.
  • Exports contributed 27.44% to the total turnover for FY2025.
  • Women represent 20% of the Board of Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STOVEC INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: ESG
